steps: Take cells from the freezer and thaw for 00:02:00 in the 37 °C water bath.
Take a T75 plate and place all needed items in ethanol-sterilized laminar flow hood.
Draw the needed amount of cells into a 50mL centrifuge tube.
Add about 7 mL of PBS into the centrifuge tube.
Spin the mixture in a centrifuge for 00:03:00 at 1500rpm.
Decant supernatant and add PBS to the cell pellet once again.
Resuspend cell pellet with the PBS using a micropipette.
Add DMEM (with FBS and antibiotics) into centrifuge tube and resuspend cell pellet.
Add DMEM to the T75 plate (sufficient to cover the entire surface area, about 5 mL ).
Add 5 mL of the cell mixture into the T75 flask.
creator: PMAT0001
